title: centaurea stevenii
intro: Centaurea stevenii, also known as Steven's knapweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the aster family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly to treat respiratory issues and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, coughs, and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and ease congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine. Centaurea stevenii can be prepared into various herbal products such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate respiratory issues.
